# MrPop.io
# Full context: https://mrpop.io/llms-full.txt
# Last-updated: 2026-04

> MrPop.io is a premium popunder and push notification advertising network that connects website publishers with advertisers worldwide. The platform specializes in high-CPM ad monetization for publishers and performance-driven traffic acquisition for advertisers.


## About MrPop.io

MrPop.io was built to make digital advertising straightforward and profitable. Unlike traditional ad networks with complex approval processes and low payouts, MrPop.io offers transparent CPM rates, weekly payments, and real-time statistics for every publisher and advertiser on the platform.

The platform supports multiple ad formats including popunder ads, push notification ads, in-page push ads, interstitial ads, smart links, and banner ads.

## For Publishers — Website Monetization

Publishers can monetize any website by embedding a lightweight JavaScript snippet (under 10KB) before the closing `</body>` tag. The ad code is asynchronously loaded and does not affect website loading speed or Google PageSpeed scores.

**Key Publisher Benefits:**
- CPM rates from $0.50 to $8.00 USD depending on traffic tier and geography
- Tier 1 countries (US, UK, CA, AU) earn $3.00–$8.00 CPM
- Tier 2 countries earn $1.00–$3.00 CPM
- Tier 3 countries earn $0.50–$1.00 CPM
- Weekly payouts every Monday for the previous week's earnings
- Minimum payout threshold: $50 USD
- Payment methods: PayPal, Bitcoin, USDT, Wire Transfer (fee: $25)
- Revenue share: up to 70% (one of the highest in the industry)
- 100% fill rate guarantee
- Real-time statistics dashboard with impression, click, and revenue tracking
- Anti-adblock technology that serves ads to users with ad blockers
- Compatible with Google AdSense and all other ad networks

**Publisher Requirements:**
- Minimum 1,000 daily visitors (basic tier)
- Original, legal content
- No adult, illegal, or malicious content
- Quality traffic (no bots or incentivized traffic)

## For Advertisers — Traffic & Campaign Management

Advertisers can create and manage campaigns targeting specific geographies, devices, operating systems, browsers, languages, and connection types.

**Key Advertiser Features:**
- Minimum deposit: $100 USD
- Payment methods: PayPal, Credit Card (Visa, MasterCard, Amex), Bitcoin, USDT
- No hidden fees; unused funds fully refundable
- Campaign approval within 1–2 hours during business hours
- Targeting options: Country, City, Region, Device, OS, Browser, Language, Connection Type
- Conversion tracking via S2S postback URLs or JavaScript pixel
- Real-time bid management and campaign statistics
- Fraud protection: bot detection, IP filtering, click pattern analysis

**Available Ad Formats:**
1. **Popunder Ads** — Opens a new tab/window behind the active browser window
2. **Push Notification Ads** — Browser-native push notifications to opted-in users
3. **In-Page Push Ads** — Push-style ads displayed within the web page content
4. **Interstitial Ads** — Full-screen ads shown between page transitions
5. **Smart Links** — Direct links that auto-detect and optimize for user device/location
6. **Banner Ads** — Standard display banner placements

## Payments & Payouts

**Publisher Payout Schedule:**
- Weekly payments, processed every Monday
- Earnings from Monday–Sunday of the previous week
- Minimum payout: $50 USD

**Advertiser Deposits:**
- Minimum: $100 USD
- Available via PayPal, card, Bitcoin, USDT
- No processing fees for most payment methods

## Technology & Integration

- RESTful API available for publishers and advertisers
- JavaScript ad tag integration (async, non-blocking)
- Anti-adblock bypass technology
- Multi-layer fraud detection system
- Real-time bidding (RTB) compatible
- S2S and pixel-based conversion tracking

## Company Information

- **Website:** https://mrpop.io
- **Platform:** MrPop.io Ad Network
- **Category:** Digital Advertising, Ad Network, Publisher Monetization
- **Specialization:** Popunder Ads, Push Notification Ads, CPM Advertising
- **Audience:** Website Publishers, Digital Advertisers, Affiliate Marketers
